summary: Iteration 2 testing of Team Task Manager: comments backend + frontend (Task Detail Drawer, My Tasks page, ⌘K Command Palette). Backend: 36/36 pytest tests pass (25 prior + 11 new comments tests). Frontend: all critical new UI flows verified via Playwright on admin user — drawer opens on task-card click, status quick-change buttons fire PATCH, admin sees Edit details + Delete task, admin can post + delete comments, all 4 My Tasks tabs render and my-task row opens drawer, header global-search button opens palette, ⌘K + filter typing works and Enter navigates. Regression existing flows still pass.

issues: Radix DialogContent emits a11y warnings: missing DialogTitle and DialogDescription/aria-describedby. Wrap CommandInput with a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle/Description (or use shadcn's CommandDialog with title prop) to silence and improve screen-reader accessibility.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer still emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings during initial mount. Charts do render correctly. Add minWidth/minHeight on the parent card or use aspect prop.

action_items: (LOW) Add VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle>/<DialogDescription> inside CommandPalette to remove Radix a11y console warnings.
(LOW – carry-over) Add minWidth/minHeight to Recharts ResponsiveContainer parents on Dashboard to suppress width(-1) warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_comments.py: clean and small (~70 lines), uses uuid4 string _id (no Mongo ObjectId leaks), serializer renames _id -> id correctly, RBAC enforced (admin bypass, member must be project member, otherwise 403/404 as appropriate).
CommentCreate uses Pydantic min_length=1 — empty body correctly returns 422 (verified by test_empty_body_rejected).

TaskDetailDrawer.jsx has a suboptimal data-fetch pattern: GETs /tasks?project_id= (empty) and then unconditionally falls back to GET /tasks to find the task by id. Works but causes 1–2 extra unscoped list calls per drawer-open. Recommend adding a real GET /api/tasks/{id} endpoint in backend and using it here.
CommandPalette.jsx fetches /projects + /tasks on every open (no cache). Fine for current data sizes; consider memoising or invalidating less frequently.
server.py CORS uses allow_credentials=False with origins from env — appropriate for Bearer JWT (no cookies).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (added TestComments class with 11 tests for new comments endpoints)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested admin flows; member-side comment + RBAC verified via backend tests

seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates and cleans up TEST_comments_proj, TEST_comments_proj_private, TEST_c_task, TEST_c_task_private (project teardown removes them). UI testing left a handful of 'TEST_AUTO admin/member comment' entries in DB on existing seeded tasks; cosmetic, can be ignored or purged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (36 tests, ~11s). New comments endpoints exercised: GET/POST /api/tasks/{tid}/comments and DELETE /api/comments/{cid} including 401/403/404/422 cases. UI selectors verified: nav-my tasks, task-drawer, drawer-status-{todo|in_progress|done}, drawer-edit-full, drawer-delete, comment-input, comment-submit, comments-list, comment-delete-{id}, tab-{today|upcoming|overdue|done}, my-task-{id}, command-input, global-search. ⌘K palette opens via Control+k and via clicking the header global-search input (which dispatches a synthetic keydown).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Two pre-existing LOW-priority a11y/console warnings only.
